sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84150" key="podi/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ποδ-ίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n84150.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shoe.</tr_> in pl., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:168" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.168</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
